title: French Sandwich
description: A simple yet delicious French-inspired sandwich made with ciabatta bread and filled with ham and cheese.
instructions: 1. Preheat a panini press to medium heat.
2. Slice the ciabatta bread in half.
3. Butter the cut sides of the bread.
4. Place the ham and cheese on the bottom slice of bread.
5. Place the top slice of bread on the filling.
6. Place the sandwich in the panini press.
7. Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
8. Remove the sandwich from the press and let it cool for a minute before serving.
